name: Aroon_CMO_ADX_EMA_Trend
description: Uses Aroon oscillator for trend direction, ADX for trend strength, CMO for momentum confirmation, and EMA as a trend filter. Enters on strong, confirmed trends and exits on early reversal or momentum loss.

name: CCI_ATR_Breakout_Trend
description: Volatility breakout using a simple moving average plus ATR channel, confirmed by CCI momentum. Long entry when price breaks above the upper band and CCI is above a positive threshold; short entry on downside break with CCI below a negative threshold. Exits occur when price returns to the SMA or when CCI loses its extreme momentum, ensuring early exits on reversal.

name: Kama_Atr_Breakout_Trend
description: Breakout strategy using KAMA (Kaufman Adaptive Moving Average) as the adaptive middle line and ATR-based volatility bands. Entry triggers when price closes above the upper band (long) or below the lower band (short), confirmed by ADX > threshold to ensure a trending regime. Exits occur when price crosses back below/above the KAMA midline, capturing the core trend while avoiding whipsaws.

name: Keltner_ADX_Breakout
description: Breakout of Keltner Channel (middle EMA, upper/lower based on ATR) with ADX trend strength filter. Enter long when price crosses above upper band and ADX above threshold; short when crosses below lower band and ADX above threshold. Exit when price crosses back into the channel (below middle for long, above middle for short).

name: MACD_EMA_NATR_Breakout
description: A trend-following breakout strategy using MACD momentum, EMA direction filter, and NATR volatility expansion to avoid choppy markets. Uses vectorized logic without division by zero.

name: MACD_Histogram_Slope_Position_Follower
description: A 30-minute position-intraday strategy that exploits major volatility shifts in the VN30F1M contract. It tracks the physical derivative momentum via the rate of change of the MACD Histogram slope rather than simple crosses, capturing institutional velocity early. To prevent false breakouts during the market's common prolonged narrow sideways phases, entries are restricted by a strict Normalized ATR (NATR) threshold acting as a structural volatility filter. Vectorized exits use a multi-bar rolling median price boundary to protect the position over broader multi-hour swings.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < Midpoint - 0.25 * ATR) or (Hist_Slope < 0.0). Exit Short: (close > Midpoint + 0.25 * ATR) or (Hist_Slope > 0.0).

name: Macd_LinReg_Atr_Follow
description: A trend-following strategy using MACD momentum, Linear Regression Slope for direction confirmation, and ATR for volatility filtering. Entry on MACD cross + positive slope; exit based on price structure breakdown.

name: MACD_NATR_Divergence
description: Detects price-high divergence against MACD histogram momentum, filtered by NATR volatility regime to avoid choppy markets.

name: MACD_NATR_Momentum_Enforcer
description: A momentum strategy using MACD histogram for direction and NATR to filter noise, confirmed by EMA trend alignment. Exits on signal reversal or price crossing below the moving average.

name: MACD_Volume_Trend_Follow
description: Trend following strategy using MACD momentum direction and ATR volatility filter to confirm trend strength. Exits on signal reversal.

name: Marubozu_ATR_RSI_Confirmation
description: Uses Marubozu candlestick patterns (strong directional bars with little or no wicks) as primary entry signals, confirmed by EMA trend direction and RSI regime filter. Exits on overbought/oversold RSI levels or ATR-based trailing stop to capture momentum bursts while managing risk.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (rsi > rsi_exit_upper) | (close < (ema_fast - atr_multiplier * atr)). Exit Short: (rsi < rsi_exit_lower) | (close > (ema_fast + atr_multiplier * atr)).

name: MeanReversion_Zscore_RSI_ADX_Filter
description: A mean reversion strategy that trades price deviations from a rolling statistical baseline (Z-Score) confirmed by momentum exhaustion, filtered to avoid strong trend regimes using ADX.

name: Mean_Reversion_Triple_Standard_Deviation
description: A structural position-intraday mean-reversion strategy engineered for the 30-minute timeframe. It capitalizes on extreme price exhaustion away from institutional value zones while avoiding premature entries. The strategy determines standard deviation bands using a long lookback period to accommodate fewer daily bars. It conditions entry upon an overextended RSI coupled with a structural close outside the wide Bollinger Bands. To maximize safety, it filters against strong trend regimes using the Aroon Oscillator. Exits are dynamically calculated via the rolling median price midpoint to guarantee statistical reversion.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close > Midpoint) or (close < BB_Lower - 1.5 * ATR). Exit Short: (close < Midpoint) or (close > BB_Upper + 1.5 * ATR).

name: MedianROC_Bollinger_Thrust
description: Uses median price (high+low)/2 rate of change (ROC) as momentum indicator. Enters long when ROC crosses above Bollinger Band upper band, short when crosses below lower band, with ADX trend strength filter. Exits when ROC reverts to middle band.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (roc_med < bb_middle). Exit Short: (roc_med > bb_middle).

name: Micro_Acceleration_Burst_Scalper
description: Ultra-fast scalping strategy capturing directional momentum bursts using price acceleration (difference of linear regression slopes) confirmed by volume surge. Enters on breakout of short-term high/low when acceleration turns positive/negative and volume expands. Exits when acceleration reverses or price violates a volatility-based trailing stop (chandelier exit). Designed for high-noise 1m environment with tight risk management.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (price_accel < 0) | (close < (trail_high - 2.0 * atr)). Exit Short: (price_accel > 0) | (close > (trail_low + 2.0 * atr)).

name: Micro_APO_ADXR_Volume_Burst_Scalper
description: Ultra-fast scalping strategy combining Absolute Price Oscillator (APO) zero-line cross and momentum acceleration with ADXR trend strength filter and volume burst confirmation. Entries on strong directional momentum with volume surge; exits on momentum reversal or price trailing below fast EMA minus ATR.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (APO < 0) | (close < (EMA_fast - ATR)). Exit Short: (APO > 0) | (close > (EMA_fast + ATR)).

name: Micro_Aroon_Oscillator_Alpha_Scalper
description: An ultra-fast 1-minute scalping strategy engineered to capture high-velocity structural pivots in the VN30F1M contract while isolating execution from horizontal chop. It tracks short-term cyclical turning points using a hyper-short Aroon Oscillator threshold. To protect against fakeouts during compressed sideways regimes and entirely side-step division traps on zero-volume bars, entries require a structural volatility expansion trigger where the immediate standard deviation breaks past a medium-term moving baseline. Vectorized loop-free exits are executed array-wise using tight rolling channels based on historical extremes.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < Micro_Low) or (Aroon_Osc < 0.0). Exit Short: (close > Micro_High) or (Aroon_Osc > 0.0).

name: Micro_BBSqueeze_Volume_Breakout
description: Ultra-fast scalping strategy capitalizing on Bollinger Band squeeze breakouts with volume confirmation. Enters long when bandwidth is extremely low (squeeze) and price closes above upper band with above-average volume; short when price closes below lower band with volume burst. Exits when price crosses back below/above the middle band, capturing small momentum bursts.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: close < BB_middle. Exit Short: close > BB_middle.

name: Micro_Chande_Absolute_Range_Scalper
description: An ultra-fast 1-minute scalping strategy engineered to capture immediate directional momentum surges in the VN30F1M contract. It tracks micro-velocity modifications using a hyper-short Chande Momentum Oscillator (CMO) to spot early buying or selling imbalances. To eliminate noise during the market's common narrow sideways regimes and safely side-step division errors on zero-volume or flat bars, entries are strictly conditioned on an absolute true range (trange) expanding beyond a short rolling standard deviation floor. Exits are executed array-wise at the close of the candlestick when micro-momentum stalls or an ultra-tight trailing boundary is breached.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (CMO < 0.0) or (close < Micro_Low). Exit Short: (CMO > 0.0) or (close > Micro_High).

name: Micro_DEMA_ADXR_Volume_Scalper
description: Ultra-fast scalping strategy using price crossing a fast Double Exponential Moving Average (DEMA), confirmed by rising ADXR (smoothed directional strength) and a volume spike. Exit uses a chandelier-style trailing stop based on ATR. ADX filter prevents trades in low-volatility sideways regimes.

formula.entry_long: close > DEMA_fast AND ADXR > ADX_threshold AND ADX > ADX_threshold AND volume > vol_ma * vol_multiplier
formula.entry_short: close < DEMA_fast AND ADXR > ADX_threshold AND ADX > ADX_threshold AND volume > vol_ma * vol_multiplier
formula.exit_logic: For long positions: exit when close < (highest_high - ATR * trail_multiplier). For short positions: exit when close > (lowest_low + ATR * trail_multiplier).

name: Micro_DI_Cross_Volume_Burst_Scalper
description: Ultra-fast scalping for VN30F1M 1-minute futures using directional movement index (DI) crossovers confirmed by volume surge and ADX trend filter. Enters long when +DI crosses above -DI with volume > volume_sma * multiplier and ADX > threshold. Short on opposite cross. Exits on opposite DI cross or trailing ATR stop (1.0-2.5x ATR from entry). Uses short periods (5-15) for responsiveness and filters out zero-volume bars.

formula.entry_long: (PLUS_DI > MINUS_DI) AND (PLUS_DI.shift(1) <= MINUS_DI.shift(1)) AND (volume > VOLUME_SMA * volume_mult) AND (ADX > adx_threshold) AND (volume > 0)
formula.entry_short: (MINUS_DI > PLUS_DI) AND (MINUS_DI.shift(1) <= PLUS_DI.shift(1)) AND (volume > VOLUME_SMA * volume_mult) AND (ADX > adx_threshold) AND (volume > 0)
formula.exit_logic: For long: exit when (MINUS_DI > PLUS_DI) OR (close < entry_price - atr_mult * ATR). For short: exit when (PLUS_DI > MINUS_DI) OR (close > entry_price + atr_mult * ATR).

name: Micro_Donchian_Volume_Burst_Scalper
description: Ultra-fast scalping strategy using Donchian channel breakout with volume surge confirmation and ATR volatility filter. Enters long when price breaks above previous bar's upper channel with above-average volume and sufficient volatility; exits when price falls back below channel midline. Short logic symmetric.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < midline). Exit Short: (close > midline).

name: Micro_Kama_BOP_Filtered_Scalper
description: An ultra-fast scalping strategy optimized for the highly noisy 1-minute timeframe of the VN30F1M contract. It tracks micro-momentum shifts using the slope of a hyper-short Kaufman Adaptive Moving Average (KAMA) to filter out deceptive noise. True underlying accumulation/distribution is confirmed using Balance of Power (BOP) to handle zero-volume or flat bars smoothly without division errors. A standardized volatility floor ensures the market is active before executing trades. Vectorized exits are processed via tight trailing micro-channel extremes.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < Micro_Low) or (KAMA_Slope < 0.0). Exit Short: (close > Micro_High) or (KAMA_Slope > 0.0).

name: Micro_LinearSlope_Volume_Acceleration_Scalper
description: Ultra-fast scalping strategy that enters on zero-line cross of linear regression slope (momentum change) confirmed by volume surge above TRIMA and volatility expansion (ATR rising). Exits using ATR trailing stop or opposite slope cross.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < (trailing_high - 1.5 * atr)) | (lin_slope < 0). Exit Short: (close > (trailing_low + 1.5 * atr)) | (lin_slope > 0).

name: Micro_Linear_Angle_BOP_Volatility_Guard
description: An ultra-fast 1-minute scalping strategy engineered to capitalize on explosive directional momentum spikes in the VN30F1M contract. It tracks instantaneous trend trajectory using the Linear Regression Angle of the close price over a micro lookback period. To filter out deceptive fakeouts inherent to the noisy 1-minute timeframe and prevent division-by-zero errors on flat bars, true structural capital accumulation is verified via the Balance of Power (BOP) smoothed with a short WMA. Entries are explicitly blocked during quiet sideways regimes unless immediate absolute volatility expands past a moving historical deviation floor. Vectorized loop-free exits track micro-channel price boundaries.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < Micro_Low) or (LR_Angle < 0.0). Exit Short: (close > Micro_High) or (LR_Angle > 0.0).

name: Micro_Linear_Slope_BOP_Alpha_Scalper
description: An ultra-fast 1-minute scalping strategy that exploits momentary institutional micro-trends in the VN30F1M contract. It tracks instantaneous direction using the slope of a short-term linear regression curve. To protect against the pitfalls of noisy fakeouts and frequent zero-volume or flat bars, true underlying accumulation is confirmed via the Balance of Power (BOP) indicator smoothed with a short WMA. A standard deviation filter acts as a baseline volatility floor, forcing the system to bypass sideways markets. Array-based vectorized exits track tight rolling channels anchored to historical price extremes.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < Micro_Low) or (Slope_Fast < 0.0). Exit Short: (close > Micro_High) or (Slope_Fast > 0.0).

name: Micro_LRSlope_Cross_Volume_Scalper
description: Ultra-fast scalping strategy for 1-minute VN30F1M futures using crossover of fast and slow linear regression slopes to capture momentum shifts, confirmed by volume surge. Exits on slope reversal or ATR-based trailing stop.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (fast_slope < 0) | (close < (trail_high - atr_mult * atr)). Exit Short: (fast_slope > 0) | (close > (trail_low + atr_mult * atr)).

name: Micro_MACD_Slope_Volatility_Enforcer
description: An ultra-fast 1-minute scalping strategy that exploits high-velocity directional shifts in the VN30F1M index while neutralizing short-term noise. It isolates tactical directionality via the linear regression slope of the fast MACD histogram line, completely discarding old lagged indicator definitions. To insulate entries from flat or zero-volume bars, execution is permitted only when true range volatility expands beyond a trailing moving baseline. Out-of-loop vectorized exits track tight rolling channel extremes anchored to historical price thresholds.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < Micro_Low) or (Hist_Slope < 0.0). Exit Short: (close > Micro_High) or (Hist_Slope > 0.0).

name: Micro_Momentum_Volume_Burst
description: An ultra-fast scalping strategy optimized for the highly noisy 1-minute timeframe of the VN30F1M contract. To protect against fakeouts and trading costs, it enforces a 'Filtered Breakout' approach by requiring a structural expansion in both directional momentum (via Williams' %R) and volume activity (via the Chaikin Oscillator). To handle the high frequency of Volume = 0 bars without division errors, it relies strictly on cumulative flow metrics. Exits are executed immediately at the close of the bar whenever micro-momentum stalls or an ultra-tight trailing Donchian boundary is breached.

indicators.name: Chaikin_Osc
indicators.definition: self.feat.adosc(high, low, close, volume, fastperiod=3, slowperiod=10)

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (WillR < -50.0) or (close < Micro_Low). Exit Short: (WillR > -50.0) or (close > Micro_High).

name: Micro_SAR_Volume_Burst_Scalper
description: 1-minute scalping strategy using Parabolic SAR trend flips as primary entry signal, confirmed by volume rate of change burst and ATR expansion. Exits using Donchian channel trailing stop (lowest low for long, highest high for short). Designed for VN30F1M futures with tight stops and frequent trades.

formula.entry_long: (close.shift(1) < SAR.shift(1)) and (close > SAR) and (Volume_ROC > param_vol_roc_threshold) and (ATR > ATR.shift(1) * param_atr_expansion_factor)
formula.entry_short: (close.shift(1) > SAR.shift(1)) and (close < SAR) and (Volume_ROC > param_vol_roc_threshold) and (ATR > ATR.shift(1) * param_atr_expansion_factor)
formula.exit_logic: For long positions: exit when low < Lowest_Low. For short positions: exit when high > Highest_High.

name: Micro_StochRSI_Velocity_Scalper
description: An ultra-fast 1-minute scalping strategy engineered to capture explosive directional impulses in the VN30F1M contract while filtering out high-frequency noise. It uses StochRSI over a hyper-short lookback window to pinpoint rapid momentum velocity changes. To counter the pitfalls of choppy sideways regimes and the occurrence of zero-volume bars, entries are strictly conditioned on an absolute directional trend index (DX) threshold and a baseline standard deviation floor. Vectorized loop-free exits are triggered when the fast Stochastic %K line crosses its corresponding signal line or breaches tight rolling channels.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (Stoch_K < Stoch_D) or (close < Micro_Low). Exit Short: (Stoch_K > Stoch_D) or (close > Micro_High).

name: Micro_T3_ADX_Burst_Scalper
description: Ultra-fast scalping strategy for 1-minute timeframe using T3 moving average as dynamic trend line, ADX as trend strength filter to avoid chop, and ATR-based volatility bands for entry/exit. Only trades when volume expands above recent average to confirm momentum bursts.

formula.entry_long: (close > T3 + mult_entry * ATR) and (ADX > adx_threshold) and (volume > vol_mult * VolumeSMA)
formula.entry_short: (close < T3 - mult_entry * ATR) and (ADX > adx_threshold) and (volume > vol_mult * VolumeSMA)
formula.exit_logic: For long: close < T3 - mult_exit * ATR; For short: close > T3 + mult_exit * ATR

name: Micro_TEMA_AD_Volatility_Contraction
description: Scalping strategy on 1-minute VN30F1M using TEMA as trend filter, Chaikin A/D line for volume-weighted accumulation/distribution, and volatility contraction (ATR ratio) to avoid choppy markets. Entries occur when price crosses TEMA with AD confirming momentum and low volatility regime. Exits on opposite TEMA cross or AD reversal.

indicators.name: AD
indicators.definition: IF (high - low == 0) THEN 0 ELSE ((close - low) - (high - close)) / (high - low + 1e-8) * volume

formula.entry_long: close > TEMA AND AD > AD_SMA * ad_long_mult AND vol_contraction
formula.entry_short: close < TEMA AND AD < AD_SMA * ad_short_mult AND vol_contraction
formula.exit_logic: For long: exit when close < TEMA OR AD < AD_SMA; For short: exit when close > TEMA OR AD > AD_SMA

name: Micro_TRIMA_CMO_Volatility_Scalper
description: Ultra-fast scalping strategy for 1-minute VN30F1M using Triangular Moving Average (TRIMA) as dynamic support/resistance, Chande Momentum Oscillator (CMO) for oversold/overbought extremes, and ATR-based trailing exit. Requires volume surge to confirm micro momentum bursts while filtering noise.

formula.entry_long: (close > TRIMA) AND (CMO < -35) AND (volume > Volume_SMA * 1.2) AND (ATR > SMA(ATR, 20) * 0.5)
formula.entry_short: (close < TRIMA) AND (CMO > 35) AND (volume > Volume_SMA * 1.2) AND (ATR > SMA(ATR, 20) * 0.5)
formula.exit_logic: Exit LONG when (close < (HighestHigh - 1.5 * ATR)) OR (CMO > 20). Exit SHORT when (close > (LowestLow + 1.5 * ATR)) OR (CMO < -20).

name: Micro_TRIX_Asymmetric_Scalper
description: An ultra-fast 1-minute scalping strategy engineered to capture high-velocity price bursts in the VN30F1M market while avoiding the noise of flat bars. It uses a hyper-short Triple Exponential Derivative (TRIX) to catch structural micro-momentum pivots. To filter out high-frequency fakeouts and flat market segments (Volume = 0 bars), entries are tightly bound to an absolute volatility floor via standard deviation. Vectorized, loop-free exits are executed using the interaction of a short-term commodity channel index (CCI) shift or a direct breakout of immediate micro-high/low channels.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (CCI < -100.0) or (close < Micro_Low). Exit Short: (CCI > 100.0) or (close > Micro_High).

name: Micro_TrueRange_Volume_Burst_Breakout
description: Scalping strategy that enters on price expansion beyond a volatility threshold (fast ATR) confirmed by a volume surge above its weighted moving average. Exits using a trailing stop based on rolling high/low with a slower ATR multiple, capturing quick momentum bursts while filtering low-volume noise.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: close < (rolling_high_5 - param_c * ATR_slow). Exit Short: close > (rolling_low_5 + param_c * ATR_slow).

name: Micro_Ultimate_Keltner_Scalper
description: Mean-reversion scalper for 1m timeframe using Ultimate Oscillator (ultosc) to detect oversold/overbought conditions and Keltner Channel (based on ATR) as dynamic support/resistance. Enters long when price crosses below lower Keltner band and ultosc is below oversold threshold, confirmed by volume surge. Enters short when price crosses above upper Keltner band and ultosc is above overbought threshold, confirmed by volume surge. Exits when price returns to middle band or momentum neutralizes.

indicators.name: UltOsc
indicators.definition: self.feat.ultosc(high, low, close, timeperiod1=7, timeperiod2=14, timeperiod3=28)

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close >= Keltner_Middle) | (UltOsc > 50). Exit Short: (close <= Keltner_Middle) | (UltOsc < 50).

name: Micro_Variance_Breakout_Scalper
description: Captures explosive price moves following a spike in price variance (volatility of returns), confirmed by volume expansion. Enters when price breaks recent high/low while variance exceeds its short-term average, and volume is above average. Exits using ATR trailing stop based on EMA to capture quick scalping profits.

formula.entry_long: close > high_roll AND VAR_close > VAR_ema * 1.6 AND volume > volume_sma * 1.3
formula.entry_short: close < low_roll AND VAR_close > VAR_ema * 1.6 AND volume > volume_sma * 1.3
formula.exit_logic: Long exit: close < EMA_trail - 1.2 * ATR; Short exit: close > EMA_trail + 1.2 * ATR

name: Micro_Vol_Expansion_Scalper
description: An ultra-fast 1-minute scalping strategy capitalizing on sudden volatility expansions within the noisy VN30F1M micro-structure. It measures relative micro-volatility using the ratio of True Range to a short-term Average True Range (ATR), which eliminates any division-by-zero errors during Volume = 0 bars. Directional bias is filtered using a fast Linear Regression Angle, while micro-momentum exhaustion is captured via the Rate of Change Percentage (ROCP). Exits are strictly managed vectorially via tight trailing extreme boundaries to capture rapid, high-frequency targets.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < Micro_Low) or (LR_Angle < 0.0). Exit Short: (close > Micro_High) or (LR_Angle > 0.0).

name: Micro_Williams_Linear_Volume_Scalper
description: Ultra-fast scalping strategy for 1-minute timeframe using Williams %R oversold/overbought cross with linear regression slope direction confirmation and volume surge filter. Entries are taken when momentum extreme aligns with short-term slope and abnormal volume. Exits when momentum returns to neutral zone or slope reverses direction.

formula.exit_logic: For long positions: exit when (WILLR > willr_exit) OR (SLOPE < 0). For short positions: exit when (WILLR < willr_exit) OR (SLOPE > 0).

name: Midpoint_BOP_Equilibrium_Trail
description: Mean-reversion strategy fading deviations from the midpoint of high/low. Enters long when price drops below midpoint with positive Balance of Power (buying pressure), exits when price returns above midpoint or BOP turns strongly negative. Short side symmetric.

formula.entry_long: close < MIDPOINT AND BOP > 0 AND (MIDPOINT - close) > 0.5 * ATR
formula.entry_short: close > MIDPOINT AND BOP < 0 AND (close - MIDPOINT) > 0.5 * ATR
formula.exit_logic: Exit long when close > MIDPOINT OR BOP < -0.3; Exit short when close < MIDPOINT OR BOP > 0.3

name: Midpoint_Cross_ADX_Trail
description: Trend-following strategy using exponential moving average crossover of midpoint price (high+low)/2. ADX filters out sideways markets. Exit uses ATR-based dynamic trailing stop anchored to the slow midpoint EMA.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: close < (EMA_slow_mid - exit_atr_mult * ATR). Exit Short: close > (EMA_slow_mid + exit_atr_mult * ATR).

name: Midpoint_SAR_LinearSlope_Trail
description: Uses Midpoint (average of highest high and lowest low over period) as dynamic threshold, Linear Regression Slope to confirm trend direction, and Parabolic SAR as trailing stop exit. Long when price closes above midpoint with positive slope and above SAR; short when below midpoint with negative slope and below SAR. Exit when SAR flips side.

formula.entry_long: close > MIDPOINT AND SLOPE > 0 AND close > SAR
formula.entry_short: close < MIDPOINT AND SLOPE < 0 AND close < SAR
formula.exit_logic: For long: close < SAR; for short: close > SAR

name: Midprice_Regression_Oscillator_Trend
description: A 5-minute standard intraday strategy tracking mathematical price channels via linear regression paths. It defines an institutional trend anchor using the rolling Midprice moving average. Entry boundaries are derived from standard deviations above and below this anchor to capture technical breakouts out of tight squeeze regimes. To bypass choppy sideways noise and avoid division traps on flat or zero-volume bars, entries require confirmation from a sustained trend index (ADXR). Array-based vectorized exits track a dynamic rolling midpoint combined with an ATR offset.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < Mid_Anchor) or (close < Rolling_Max - (exit_mult * ATR)). Exit Short: (close > Mid_Anchor) or (close > Rolling_Min + (exit_mult * ATR)).

name: Midprice_StochRSI_NATR_Fader
description: Mean-reversion strategy that fades deviations from the midprice (high+low)/2. Enters long when price closes below midprice minus ATR multiple, StochRSI is oversold, and NATR indicates sufficient volatility. Enters short symmetrically. Exits when price returns toward midprice or StochRSI reaches neutral levels.

formula.entry_long: (close < midprice - entry_mult * atr) AND (stochrsi_k < oversold_threshold) AND (natr > natr_min)
formula.entry_short: (close > midprice + entry_mult * atr) AND (stochrsi_k > overbought_threshold) AND (natr > natr_min)
formula.exit_logic: For long: (close > midprice + exit_mult * atr) OR (stochrsi_k > 70) ; For short: (close < midprice - exit_mult * atr) OR (stochrsi_k < 30)

name: Midprice_Ultimate_Oscillator_Reversion
description: Mean-reversion strategy that enters when price deviates significantly from the midprice (equilibrium) and Ultimate Oscillator reaches extreme levels. Exits when price reverts to midprice or hits a volatility-based stop loss using NATR.

indicators.name: ULTOSC
indicators.definition: self.feat.ultosc(high, low, close, timeperiod1=7, timeperiod2=14, timeperiod3=28)

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close > MIDPRICE) | (close < (MIDPRICE - stop_mult * NATR)). Exit Short: (close < MIDPRICE) | (close > (MIDPRICE + stop_mult * NATR)).

name: Momentum_Roc_Adx_Follow
description: A momentum strategy that enters when price is above the trend EMA and ROC indicates acceleration, filtered by ADX strength. Exits on momentum reversal confirmed with dynamic volatility context.

name: Momentum_Roc_AdX_Trend
description: Uses Rate of Change (ROC) for momentum entry, EMA for trend direction, and ADX as a volatility regime filter to avoid choppy markets on VN30 15m timeframe.

name: NatRoc_VolExpansion_Momentum_Follow
description: Captures momentum when normalized ATR expands beyond its mean, confirming trend strength with EMA alignment. Uses volatility expansion rate to filter entry signals.

name: Natr_Adx_Linear_Breakout
description: Captures breakouts above the dynamic regression line during high volatility regimes. Exits based on price reversion relative to a volatility-adjusted pivot.

name: NatR_Ema_VolExpansion
description: Detects trend direction using EMA and confirms market regime via NATR volatility expansion relative to its rolling mean. Exits on price reversal or significant volatility contraction.

name: NATR_LinearSlope_Trend_Activator
description: Combines linear regression slope for trend direction with Normalized Average True Range (NATR) as volatility filter. Enters only when volatility is above threshold to avoid choppy markets. Exits when trend slope reverses or volatility collapses below exit threshold.

formula.exit_logic: For long positions: exit when LRS <= 0 OR NATR < vol_exit_threshold. For short positions: exit when LRS >= 0 OR NATR < vol_exit_threshold.

name: NATR_ROC_Volatility_Expansion
description: Strategy enters long when volatility expands (NATR above rolling mean) and momentum confirms up. Exits on momentum reversal or contraction.

name: OBV_Accumulation_ADX_Trend_System
description: Uses On-Balance Volume (OBV) to detect accumulation/distribution, confirmed by ADX trend strength. Enters when OBV crosses its EMA and ADX above threshold. Exits with ATR-based trailing stop to lock in profits during strong trends.

formula.exit_logic: Long exit: close < HIGHEST_HIGH - trail_mult * ATR; Short exit: close > LOWEST_LOW + trail_mult * ATR

name: OBV_Natr_Ema_Breakout
description: A volatility and volume breakout strategy using OBV flow confirmation with EMA trend direction, filtered by ADX regime to avoid choppy markets.

formula.entry_long: (close > EMA_fast) & (obv_cross_above(OBV, OBV_SMA)) & (feat.adx(close, high, low, volume, timeperiod=14) > 25)
formula.entry_short: (close < EMA_fast) & (obv_cross_below(OBV, OBV_SMA)) & (feat.adx(close, high, low, volume, timeperiod=14) > 25)

name: OBV_Slope_Volatility_Filter
description: Uses On-Balance Volume to confirm buying/selling pressure, linear regression slope of price to gauge trend direction, and Normalized Average True Range to filter low volatility regimes. Enters long when OBV above its SMA, slope positive, and volatility sufficient; exits when either OBV falls below SMA or slope turns negative. Short side is symmetric.

name: Open_Close_Volatility_Trend
description: Session-based trend-following strategy using Open Price as session anchor, ADX for regime filtering, and ATR-adjusted EMA trailing stops to avoid chop.

name: Oscillator_Divergence_Trend_Filter
description: A 10-minute balanced intraday strategy that captures momentum divergence setups while operating strictly within institutional trend directions. It evaluates macro-trend health via the structural relationship of a double exponential moving average (DEMA). Signal confirmation is triggered by an interaction between the absolute directional index (ADX) measuring structural breakout validity, and the Stochastic Oscillator tracking short-term price exhaustion. Vectorized trailing exits are derived via standard deviations from a middle reference anchor.

indicators.name: Stoch_K
indicators.definition: self.feat.stoch(high, low, close, fastk_period=stoch_period, slowk_period=3, slowk_matype=0, slowd_period=3, slowd_matype=0)[0]

indicators.name: Stoch_D
indicators.definition: self.feat.stoch(high, low, close, fastk_period=stoch_period, slowk_period=3, slowk_matype=0, slowd_period=3, slowd_matype=0)[1]

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < BB_Mid - 0.5 * StdDev). Exit Short: (close > BB_Mid + 0.5 * StdDev).

name: Osc_Divergence_RSI_Price_ADX
description: Strategy detects Bullish/Bearish divergence between Price and RSI momentum, filtered by ADX trend regime. Uses price structure (High/Low) vs Oscillator peaks to identify reversal points in trending markets.

name: Parabolic_SAR_MFI_Structural_Breakout
description: A 5-minute standard intraday strategy designed to capture robust breakout moves following structural consolidations in the VN30F1M contract. It tracks localized trend directional flips using the Parabolic SAR. To isolate high-probability expansions from deceptive noise and frequent zero-volume phases, entries are validated by volume-weighted momentum filtering via the Money Flow Index (MFI). This prevents division-by-zero crashes while ensuring strong institutional volume participation. Vectorized loop-free exits are processed using an adaptive trailing midpoint channel combined with an ATR offset.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < SAR) or (close < Rolling_Max - (exit_mult * ATR)). Exit Short: (close > SAR) or (close > Rolling_Min + (exit_mult * ATR)).

name: Piercing_Cloud_ATR_Trail
description: Uses bullish Piercing pattern for long entries and bearish Dark Cloud Cover for short entries, filtered by trend (EMA) and volatility regime (ATR relative to its SMA). Exits with ATR-based trailing stop or profit target.

formula.exit_logic: Exit long: (close < HighestHigh_5 - trail_mult * ATR) OR (close > EMA_trend + profit_mult * ATR). Exit short: (close > LowestLow_5 + trail_mult * ATR) OR (close < EMA_trend - profit_mult * ATR).

name: PPO_Bandwidth_Expansion_Strategy
description: Combines Percentage Price Oscillator (PPO) momentum signal with Bollinger Bandwidth expansion to identify high-volatility trend initiation points. Enters long when PPO crosses above its signal line and bandwidth expands above its recent average; enters short on opposite crossover. Exits when momentum reverses (PPO crosses zero) or volatility contracts (bandwidth falls below average). Designed for 30m VN30F1M to capture major swings with 0-2 trades per day.

formula.exit_logic: For long: exit when PPO < 0 OR Bandwidth < Bandwidth_ma * 0.8; For short: exit when PPO > 0 OR Bandwidth < Bandwidth_ma * 0.8

name: PPO_CMO_ATR_Trail
description: Combines Percentage Price Oscillator (PPO) zero-line cross as primary momentum signal with Chande Momentum Oscillator (CMO) to confirm strength, and uses ATR-based trailing stop for exits. Designed for 5-minute VN30F1M futures, capturing directional moves while filtering low-momentum regimes.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < (highest_high - 2.0 * ATR)). Exit Short: (close > (lowest_low + 2.0 * ATR)).

name: PPO_LinearSlope_Momentum_Flow
description: Enters long when PPO crosses above zero with positive linear regression slope and sufficient ATR volatility, exits when PPO crosses below zero. Short trades use opposite logic. Uses momentum confirmation and volatility filter to avoid choppy markets.

name: PPO_NATR_Momentum_Breakout
description: Captures momentum shifts using Price Momentum Oscillator (PPO) combined with volatility confirmation via Normalized ATR. Enters on PPO crossover up during expanding volatility regimes, exits when momentum reverses.

name: Regression_Deviation_Aroon_Reversion
description: Mean reversion strategy that enters when price deviates significantly from the linear regression line (z-score threshold) while Aroon confirms the trend direction (uptrend for long, downtrend for short). Exits when price reverts to the regression line or when deviation becomes extreme (stop loss). Designed for 0-2 trades per day on VN30F1M.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close > linreg) | (zscore < -stop_mult). Exit Short: (close < linreg) | (zscore > stop_mult).

name: Regression_Residual_Chandelier_Reversion
description: Mean-reversion strategy using linear regression residual to identify oversold/overbought conditions during low-trend regimes (ADX < threshold). Enters long when price is significantly below the regression line, short when significantly above. Exits via Chandelier stop (highest high minus ATR for longs, lowest low plus ATR for shorts) or when residual crosses zero, locking in mean-reversion profits while limiting downside in case of trend emergence.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < (highest_high - atr_multiplier * ATR)) | (residual > 0). Exit Short: (close > (lowest_low + atr_multiplier * ATR)) | (residual < 0).

name: ROCP_ADXR_Trend_Strength
description: Captures directional momentum bursts using Rate of Change Percentage (ROCP) as primary signal, confirmed by ADXR trend strength and EMA trend alignment. Exits when momentum fades (ROCP changes sign) or trend weakens (ADXR falls below 20). Designed for 15-minute VN30F1M futures with 1-3 high-quality trades per day.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (ROCP < 0) | (ADXR < 20). Exit Short: (ROCP > 0) | (ADXR < 20).

name: ROC_BBWidth_Momentum_System
description: Captures momentum bursts confirmed by volatility expansion and trend alignment. Uses Rate of Change (ROC) as primary momentum signal, Bollinger Bandwidth (BBW) to filter low-volatility sideways regimes, and Triangular Moving Average (TRIMA) for trend direction. Exits when momentum fades (ROC crosses zero) or price violates trailing ATR stop.

formula.entry_long: ROC > roc_threshold AND close > TRIMA AND BBW > bbw_threshold
formula.entry_short: ROC < -roc_threshold AND close < TRIMA AND BBW > bbw_threshold
formula.exit_logic: For long: exit when ROC < 0 OR close < TRIMA - exit_atr_mult * ATR; For short: exit when ROC > 0 OR close > TRIMA + exit_atr_mult * ATR

name: RollingZscore_LinearSlope_Trend_Follow
description: A trend-following strategy that uses Linear Regression Slope to identify the market regime (uptrend/downtrend) and Rolling Z-Score to confirm pullback entries within the established trend. It avoids choppy sideways markets by requiring a significant slope direction.

name: Rolling_ZS_Trend_Follow
description: Enters when price deviates significantly from the mean (Z-Score > Threshold) while maintaining a positive trend slope. Exits on reversion to mean or negative Z-Score.

name: RSI_Price_Divergence_NATR_Filter
description: Captures potential trend exhaustion or reversal by entering when RSI momentum improves (rising) while price remains below the EMA, signaling divergence between technical indicators. Exits on trend reversion.

name: SessionBreakout_NATR_Volume
description: Breakout strategy using prior session high/low (rolling window). Confirms breakout with NATR volatility filter and volume surge. Exits when price crosses a short-term EMA, capturing reversal.

name: SessionVWAP_Slope_Breakout
description: Uses a rolling VWAP over the typical session length (e.g., 8 bars) as a dynamic reference, combined with ATR volatility and linear regression slope to capture breakout moves during the session. Enters long when price breaks above VWAP plus ATR band with positive slope, and short when price breaks below VWAP minus ATR band with negative slope. Exits when price returns to VWAP or slope reverses.

name: Session_Cci_Roc_Breakout
description: Intraday momentum breakout strategy using CCI and ROC to confirm trend strength during high volatility sessions, filtered by price position relative to SMA.

name: Session_Chande_Volatility_Breakout
description: A structural position-intraday strategy designed for the 30-minute timeframe of the VN30F1M contract. It capitalizes on institutional momentum following early-session range stabilization. The strategy tracks structural breakouts using a medium-term rolling high/low channel. To avoid classic false breakouts typical in the Vietnamese derivatives market, entry signals must be validated by a directional momentum trend surge via the Chande Momentum Oscillator (CMO) and a high-regime volatility confirmation using the True Range. Exits are dynamically calculated using an adaptive technical baseline anchored on the rolling midpoint.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < Midpoint). Exit Short: (close > Midpoint).

name: Session_Cmf_Atr_Regime_Breakout
description: Strategy designed to capture breakout opportunities during session hours using Cumulative Flow (CMF) direction and ATR volatility expansion. It avoids hard stop losses by exiting at candle close when trend signal reverses, ensuring robustness against zero volume bars.

name: Session_Cmo_Vol_Fluid
description: Captures momentum during high volatility periods often associated with session transitions in VN30F, using CMO for direction and ATR expansion as a filter.

name: Session_Open_CMF_EMA_Trail
description: Intraday trend-following strategy that uses Session Open strength (current bar close vs open) and Cumulative Money Flow to confirm momentum, filtered by EMA direction. Avoids time-dependent logic but relies on price structure typical of session opens.

name: Session_VWAP_CMF_Flow_Breakout
description: Intraday session strategy trading around VWAP with Volume Flow confirmation, avoiding noise by filtering on institutional flow direction.

name: Session_Williams_R_Volatility_Squeeze
description: A high-quality 15-minute swing intraday strategy utilizing Williams' %R momentum shifts paired with an asymmetric volatility breakout. It locates key value distribution using a medium-term Triangular Moving Average (TRIMA) baseline. Momentum surges are detected when the fast Williams' %R crosses outside its classic trading bands. To protect against fakeouts during compressed horizontal phases and to circumvent division traps on zero-volume bars, entries require a structural volatility expansion condition where the short standard deviation breaks past an adjusted ATR threshold channel. Out-of-loop vectorized exits track price deviations away from rolling structural midpoints.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < Midpoint_Exit) or (WILLR < -50.0). Exit Short: (close > Midpoint_Exit) or (WILLR > -50.0).

name: Session_Willr_Breakout
description: Breakout strategy that uses the high/low of the previous session (rolling window) as a range, with Williams %R to confirm momentum and ATR to filter low-volatility periods. Entries occur when price breaks the range with strong overbought/oversold signals; exits happen when price returns to the session midpoint.

name: Session_Wma_Adx_Trend_Follow
description: A trend-following strategy for VN30 Index Futures that uses Weighted Moving Average (WMA) to identify direction and ADX to filter out low-volatility choppy markets. It prioritizes major trends during active sessions by requiring high volatility strength before entry.

name: Slope_Acceleration_EMA_Follow
description: Trend following strategy using slope acceleration (shorter timeframe slope steeper than longer) combined with ADX strength filter for entry, and EMA cross/price position for exit.

name: Slope_Adr_VolatilityBreakout
description: Trend breakout strategy using Linear Reg Slope direction confirmation combined with ATR volatility expansion. Avoids MACD/CMF to ensure uniqueness from accepted strategies.

name: Slope_CMO_ADXR_Trend
description: Combines linear regression slope for directional bias, Chande Momentum Oscillator (CMO) for momentum confirmation, and ADXR (smoothed ADX) for trend strength. Enters long when slope positive, CMO above threshold, and ADXR above threshold. Exits when CMO drops below zero or ADXR falls below threshold. Short logic is symmetric.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (cmo < 0) | (adxr < adxr_threshold) | (close < (rolling_max_close - 2 * atr)). Exit Short: (cmo > 0) | (adxr < adxr_threshold) | (close > (rolling_max_close + 2 * atr)).

name: Slope_Ema_Atr_Trend_Trail
description: Trend following strategy using Linear Regression Slope for direction, EMA for price trend confirmation, and ATR-based trailing stop to manage risk without hard SLs.

name: Slope_Ema_Natr_Trend_Follow
description: Trend following strategy using Price Slope and EMA direction, filtered by Natural ATR volatility to avoid choppy markets. Exits on trend reversal candle close.

name: Slope_Roc_Natr_Follow
description: Trend following strategy using Linear Regression Slope for direction and Rate of Change (ROC) for momentum confirmation, filtered by Normalized ATR volatility expansion.

name: Slope_Roc_Natr_Multi_Swing_15m
description: A multi-factor momentum strategy using LinearReg Slope for trend direction, ROC for acceleration confirmation, and NATR volatility expansion to filter entries and exit trades. Avoids fixed stop losses by relying on volatility exhaustion.

name: Slope_RSI_Pullback
description: A momentum strategy that enters on pullbacks within a trend, using Linear Regression Slope to confirm direction and RSI for entry timing. Exits when the slope reverses or price crosses below EMA.

name: Slope_Stochrsi_ATR_Trend
description: A trend-following strategy that uses Linear Regression Slope for direction, StochRSI for entry timing within the regime, and ATR to filter volatility expansion. It avoids ADX reliance by using slope magnitude thresholds.

name: Star_Reversal_ADX_Trail
description: Uses Morning Star and Evening Star candlestick patterns as primary reversal signals, filtered by ADX trend strength and EMA trend direction. Exits with ATR-based trailing stop from recent extremes.

formula.exit_logic: Exit long when close < (HIGHEST_HIGH - ATR * trailing_mult); Exit short when close > (LOWEST_LOW + ATR * trailing_mult)

name: Stochastic_EMA_ADX_Trend
description: Uses StochRSI for momentum trigger, EMA direction to confirm trend context, and ADX as a regime filter. Exits on price reversal relative to EMA.

name: Stochastic_EMA_Trend_Follow
description: Uses Fast Stochastic Oscillator to confirm momentum on EMA trend direction, avoiding ADX/MACD heavy filters found in other strategies. Entry requires Price above EMA and Stoch cross up from neutral zone.

name: StochF_LinearSlope_Momentum_Tracker
description: 30-minute momentum strategy using fast stochastic (StochF) %K line cross of oversold/overbought levels, confirmed by linear regression slope of price to ensure trend direction, with a volatility regime filter using ATR to avoid low-volatility chop. Exits when slope reverses or oscillator reaches opposite extreme.

indicators.name: stochf_k
indicators.definition: STOCHF(high, low, close, fastk_period=10, fastd_period=3) -> fastk component

formula.entry_long: stochf_k > oversold_threshold AND stochf_k_prev <= oversold_threshold AND slope > 0 AND atr > atr_sma * volatility_factor
formula.entry_short: stochf_k < overbought_threshold AND stochf_k_prev >= overbought_threshold AND slope < 0 AND atr > atr_sma * volatility_factor
formula.exit_logic: Exit long when slope < 0 OR stochf_k > overbought_threshold; exit short when slope > 0 OR stochf_k < oversold_threshold

name: StochRSI_ATR_Trailing_Momentum
description: Trend-following strategy using StochRSI oversold/overbought signals with EMA trend filter and ADX regime filter. Exits using ATR-based trailing stop on rolling high/low to capture swing moves while avoiding noise.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: close < (high.rolling(window=trail_window).max().shift(1) - (ATR.shift(1) * atr_mult)). Exit Short: close > (low.rolling(window=trail_window).min().shift(1) + (ATR.shift(1) * atr_mult)).

name: StochRSI_Divergence_SMA_Fluidity
description: A mean-reversion to trend-following hybrid strategy using Stochastic RSI momentum divergence against a Simple Moving Average filter, with ATR volatility filtering. Avoids direct volume division by relying on price-based indicators.

name: Stoch_Momentum_WMA_Trend_Enforcer
description: A balanced 10-minute timeframe strategy built on the interaction between a medium-term Weighted Moving Average (WMA) trend filter and short-term Stochastic Momentum index behavior. To isolate high-probability trend continuation points and safeguard capital from low-liquidity spikes or flat periods (Volume = 0 scenarios), entries require an active structural volatility confirmation using the Average True Range (ATR) relative to its historical deviation. Completely loop-free vectorized exits track the close price relative to trailing extremes.

indicators.name: Stoch_K
indicators.definition: self.feat.stochf(high, low, close, fastk_period=stoch_period, fastd_period=3, fastd_matype=0)[0]

indicators.name: Stoch_D
indicators.definition: self.feat.stochf(high, low, close, fastk_period=stoch_period, fastd_period=3, fastd_matype=0)[1]

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < Rolling_Max - (exit_mult * ATR)) or (close < WMA_Trend). Exit Short: (close > Rolling_Min + (exit_mult * ATR)) or (close > WMA_Trend).

name: T3_ADX_Momentum_Breakout
description: Uses T3 exponential trend direction combined with EMA confirmation, filtered by ADX strength to avoid choppy sideways markets. Avoids volume division errors.

name: T3_LinearReg_Vol_Trail
description: A trend-following strategy using Triple Exponential Moving Average (T3) and Linear Regression Slope to confirm acceleration, filtered by ATR volatility expansion. Avoids ADX/Squeeze/Angle logic found in previous strategies.

name: T3_True_Range_Asymmetric_Reversion
description: A 5-minute standard intraday mean-reversion strategy designed to capture structural exhaustion points on the VN30F1M contract. It tracks the structural equilibrium baseline using a fast T3 Triple Exponential Moving Average, which minimizes lagging distortion. Dynamic reversal bands are projected based on historical variations of the True Range. To insulate the algorithm from entering deceptive traps during low-liquidity phases or flat periods (Volume = 0 scenarios), entries require confirmation from a micro-scale directional index (DX) threshold floor. Fully vectorized, loop-free exits are triggered when prices cross the T3 equilibrium anchor.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close > T3_Base) or (close < Lower_Target - 0.5 * ATR). Exit Short: (close < T3_Base) or (close > Upper_Target + 0.5 * ATR).

name: T3_Ultimate_NATR_Confluence
description: 30-minute trend-following strategy using T3 moving average slope for trend direction, Ultimate Oscillator for oversold/overbought entry triggers, and NATR volatility filter to avoid low-volatility sideways markets. Exits occur when overbought/oversold conditions reverse or the T3 slope flips, providing a dynamic trailing mechanism.

indicators.name: ULT
indicators.definition: self.feat.ultosc(high, low, close, timeperiod1=7, timeperiod2=14, timeperiod3=28)

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (ULT > 70) | (T3 < T3_shift). Exit Short: (ULT < 30) | (T3 > T3_shift).

name: TasukiGap_ADX_Continuation
description: Continuation strategy based on Tasuki Gap candlestick patterns (bullish/bearish) confirmed by ADX trend strength. Enters on pattern detection when ADX > threshold, exits using ATR-based trailing stop from recent price extremes.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: close < (Rolling_High_Max - atr_exit_mult * ATR). Exit Short: close > (Rolling_Low_Min + atr_exit_mult * ATR).

name: TEMA_Aroonosc_NATR_Trend_Follower
description: Combines TEMA as dynamic trend direction, Aroon Oscillator to measure trend strength and conviction, and NATR to filter out low-volatility chop. Enters long when price is above TEMA and Aroonosc shows strong uptrend ( > threshold) while volatility is sufficient. Exits when Aroonosc loses momentum (crosses zero) or price violates TEMA.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (AROONOSC < 0) | (close < TEMA). Exit Short: (AROONOSC > 0) | (close > TEMA).

name: TEMA_BBPct_ADX_Trail
description: Uses TEMA slope for trend direction, Bollinger Band %B for oversold/overbought pullback entries, and ADX to filter ranging markets. Exits with ATR-based trailing stop or TEMA reversal.

formula.exit_logic: exit_long when (close < trail_max_high - trail_multiplier * ATR) OR (TEMA < TEMA_prev); exit_short when (close > trail_min_low + trail_multiplier * ATR) OR (TEMA > TEMA_prev)

name: TEMA_BBWidth_WillR_Dynamic_Trail
description: Combines TEMA trend direction, Bollinger Band width volatility expansion, and Williams %R oversold/overbought conditions for entry. Exits use trend reversal, Williams %R extreme levels, or ATR-based trailing stop (chandelier). Designed for 2-5 trades per day on VN30F1M 10-minute futures.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (WillR > -20) | (TEMA_fast < TEMA_slow) | (low < (highest_high_5 - 2 * ATR)). Exit Short: (WillR < -80) | (TEMA_fast > TEMA_slow) | (high > (lowest_low_5 + 2 * ATR)).

name: TEMA_CCI_Envelope_Reversal
description: Mean-reversion strategy that enters on oversold/overbought pullbacks within the dominant trend, using TEMA for trend direction, CCI for extreme momentum, and an ATR-based envelope around the fast TEMA as the mean-reversion zone.

formula.entry_long: (TEMA_fast > TEMA_slow) AND (close < TEMA_fast - k * ATR) AND (CCI < -100)
formula.entry_short: (TEMA_fast < TEMA_slow) AND (close > TEMA_fast + k * ATR) AND (CCI > 100)
formula.exit_logic: Long: exit when close > TEMA_fast + 0.5 * k * ATR OR close < TEMA_fast - 1.5 * k * ATR. Short: exit when close < TEMA_fast - 0.5 * k * ATR OR close > TEMA_fast + 1.5 * k * ATR.

name: TEMA_DEMA_Cross_Trend_Follower
description: Uses fast TEMA and slow DEMA crossover as primary trend signal, with ADX filter to avoid ranging markets. Exits using ATR-based trailing stop from the highest high (long) or lowest low (short) over a lookback period, capturing swing moves while limiting drawdowns.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: close < (highest_high - ATR * atr_mult_exit). Exit Short: close > (lowest_low + ATR * atr_mult_exit).

name: TEMA_StochRSI_Volatility_Filter
description: 30-minute momentum strategy using TEMA trend direction and StochRSI oversold/overbought conditions with volatility filter. Entries require TEMA slope confirmation, StochRSI extreme levels, and minimum ATR threshold. Exits using Donchian channel low/high break.

formula.entry_long: (close > TEMA) AND (TEMA > TEMA_prev) AND (StochRSI_k < os_level) AND (ATR > vol_filter_factor * ATR_MA)
formula.entry_short: (close < TEMA) AND (TEMA < TEMA_prev) AND (StochRSI_k > ob_level) AND (ATR > vol_filter_factor * ATR_MA)
formula.exit_logic: Exit Long when close < Donchian_low; Exit Short when close > Donchian_high

name: TEMA_Variance_Burst_Trend
description: Captures volatility expansion bursts confirmed by TEMA trend direction. Uses variance of close to detect sharp price movements, entering when variance expands above its moving average and price aligns with TEMA. Exits when variance contracts or trend reverses.

formula.entry_long: close > TEMA_fast AND var_raw > expansion_factor * var_sma
formula.entry_short: close < TEMA_fast AND var_raw > expansion_factor * var_sma
formula.exit_logic: exit_long = (close <= TEMA_fast) OR (var_raw < contraction_factor * var_sma); exit_short = (close >= TEMA_fast) OR (var_raw < contraction_factor * var_sma)

name: ThreeSoldiers_ThreeCrows_ATR_Trail
description: Uses bullish Three White Soldiers and bearish Three Black Crows candlestick patterns as primary entry signals, confirmed by a trend filter (price relative to EMA) and a volatility regime filter (ATR above its moving average). Exits use a Chandelier-style trailing stop based on highest highs and lowest lows scaled by ATR, ensuring exits occur only at bar close.

formula.exit_logic: For long positions: EXIT when close < chandelier_long_stop. For short positions: EXIT when close > chandelier_short_stop.

name: Trend_Following_T3_ROC
description: Uses T3 as a dynamic trend filter and ROC for momentum confirmation to identify breakouts. Exits when price closes below the EMA or volatility compresses, avoiding hard stop loss levels.

name: Trend_Slope_ATR_Follow
description: A trend-following strategy using Linear Regression Slope for direction and ATR to filter high volatility regimes. It avoids ADX/ROC/MACD logic found in accepted strategies, focusing on slope expansion.

name: Triangular_Aroon_Trend_Follower
description: Uses Triangular Moving Average as dynamic trend filter and Aroon Oscillator to confirm directional strength. Entries occur when price is on the same side of TRIMA as the Aroon Oscillator sign. Exits use an ATR-based trailing stop based on rolling highest high (long) or lowest low (short).

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: close < (rolling_high_max - 2.0 * ATR). Exit Short: close > (rolling_low_min + 2.0 * ATR).

name: TRIMA_CMF_NATR_Breakout
description: Uses TRIMA for trend direction, CMF for volume flow confirmation, and NATR to filter volatility regimes. Entry on breakout of price above TRIMA with positive money flow in active market.

name: TRIMA_CMO_NATR_Breakout
description: Volatility breakout strategy using Triangular Moving Average as dynamic center line and Normalized ATR for adaptive bands. Chande Momentum Oscillator confirms strong directional momentum to avoid false breakouts. Exits when price reverts to the mean or momentum weakens.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < TRIMA) | (CMO < cmo_exit_threshold). Exit Short: (close > TRIMA) | (CMO > -cmo_exit_threshold).

name: Triple_Exponential_CCI_Volatility_Regime
description: A balanced 10-minute intraday strategy tracking momentum continuations on the VN30F1M contract. It defines the core market bias using a medium-period Triple Exponential Moving Average (TEMA). Velocity transformations are tracked when a smoothed Commodity Channel Index (CCI) crosses beyond its typical operational boundaries. To safeguard execution capital from toxic sideways ranges and completely avoid division traps on thin or zero-volume bars, entries require structural filter verification from a Normalized ATR (NATR) threshold curve. Vectorized, loop-free exits are anchored around trailing price extremes.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < TEMA) or (close < Rolling_Max - (exit_mult * ATR)). Exit Short: (close > TEMA) or (close > Rolling_Min + (exit_mult * ATR)).

name: Triple_Exponential_Moving_Average_CCI_Swing
description: A high-quality 15-minute swing intraday strategy designed to harvest clean structural momentum arcs on the VN30F1M index while filtering out false trend starts. It tracks the institutional direction baseline using a medium-period Triple Exponential Moving Average (TEMA) to mitigate lag without sacrificing stability. Direct cyclical momentum reversals are tracked via a smoothed Commodity Channel Index (CCI). To insulate the strategy from flat, low-liquidity zones or thin bars, execution requires a definitive structural volatility expansion confirmation where the fast price standard deviation breaks out past its trailing baseline. Array-based vectorized exits use trailing price channels anchored to standard ATR multipliers.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < TEMA) or (close < Rolling_Max - (exit_mult * ATR)). Exit Short: (close > TEMA) or (close > Rolling_Min + (exit_mult * ATR)).

name: Triple_Exponential_Volatility_Channel
description: A high-quality 15-minute swing intraday strategy utilizing a Triple Exponential Moving Average (TEMA) channel envelope. The strategy addresses the distinct regime traits of the VN30F1M contract by measuring structural volatility width via a normalized standard deviation filter to bypass choppy consolidation zones. Positions are entered when price aggressively exits the structural TEMA channel envelope. Vectorized tracking exits are established via an adaptive dynamic mid-price anchor combined with an ATR factor to guarantee safe intraday execution.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < Dynamic_Mid - 0.5 * ATR). Exit Short: (close > Dynamic_Mid + 0.5 * ATR).

name: Triple_Moving_Average_ADX_Regime_Position
description: A 30-minute position intraday strategy designed to ride major macro trend shifts on the VN30F1M contract. It tracks institutional structural trends using a Triple Exponential Moving Average (TEMA) basis line to filter out intraday noise. Real-time directional strength is validated via the interaction of Plus/Minus Directional Indicators alongside an ADX threshold floor. This multi-layered filtering completely eliminates bad entries during choppy, low-liquidity horizontal range regimes (avoiding zero-volume or flat bar traps). Completely loop-free vectorized trailing exits utilize an adaptive midprice anchor coupled with a standard ATR offset.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < TEMA) or (close < Exit_Mid - 0.5 * ATR). Exit Short: (close > TEMA) or (close > Exit_Mid + 0.5 * ATR).

name: TRIX_ADX_Trail_System
description: Uses TRIX (Triple Exponential Average) zero-line crossing as primary momentum signal, filtered by ADX to avoid sideways markets. Exits employ a trailing ATR stop and ADX decay condition, designed for VN30F1M 10min to capture medium-term swings with 2-5 trades per day.

formula.exit_logic: For long: (close < (highest_high - atr_mult * ATR)) OR (ADX < adx_exit_threshold). For short: (close > (lowest_low + atr_mult * ATR)) OR (ADX < adx_exit_threshold).

name: TRIX_EMA_Momentum_Trend_Follow
description: A momentum-driven trend following strategy using TRIX for signal generation and EMA for direction confirmation. Exits on candle close when price reverses relative to EMA or momentum shifts negative.

name: TRIX_Slope_ADX_Volatility_Thrust
description: Uses TRIX momentum oscillator slope crossing a positive threshold, confirmed by ADX trend strength and Bollinger Band width volatility expansion. Exits on momentum reversal or ATR-based trailing stop.

indicators.name: BB_width
indicators.definition: (self.feat.bbands(close, timeperiod=bb_period, nbdevup=2, nbdevdn=2)[0] - self.feat.bbands(close, timeperiod=bb_period, nbdevup=2, nbdevdn=2)[2]) / self.feat.bbands(close, timeperiod=bb_period, nbdevup=2, nbdevdn=2)[1]

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (TRIX_slope < -exit_slope_thresh) | (close < (max_high_10 - atr_mult * ATR)). Exit Short: (TRIX_slope > exit_slope_thresh) | (close > (min_low_10 + atr_mult * ATR)).

name: Ultimate_Oscillator_BB_Squeeze_Reversion
description: A 5-minute standard intraday mean-reversion strategy designed to capture structural turning points out of quiet market regimes. It uses a Bollinger Bands squeeze condition based on standard deviation bandwidth to confirm that the market is tightly coiled. Reversal signals are generated via multi-timeframe buying pressure tracking via the Ultimate Oscillator (ULTOSC) reaching standard statistical exhaustion boundaries. Vectorized exits are handled via an adaptive trailing channel anchored to the rolling midprice and the Average True Range (ATR).

indicators.name: ULTOSC
indicators.definition: self.feat.ultosc(high, low, close, timeperiod1=7, timeperiod2=14, timeperiod3=28)

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close > Midprice_Exit) or (close < BB_Lower - 1.0 * ATR). Exit Short: (close < Midprice_Exit) or (close > BB_Upper + 1.0 * ATR).

name: Ultimate_Slope_Volatility_Trend
description: Uses Ultimate Oscillator (ultosc) for momentum extremes, linear regression slope for trend direction, and NATR for volatility regime. Enters long when ultosc crosses above oversold level, slope is positive, and volatility is sufficient. Enters short when ultosc crosses below overbought level, slope is negative, and volatility is sufficient. Exits when momentum reverts to neutral or slope changes sign.

indicators.name: ULT
indicators.definition: self.feat.ultosc(high, low, close, timeperiod1=self.param_ult_period1, timeperiod2=self.param_ult_period2, timeperiod3=self.param_ult_period3)

name: UltOsc_Obv_Adx_Momentum_Follow
description: Uses Ultimate Oscillator and OBV to confirm momentum direction, filtered by ADX strength. Exits on price deviation beyond EMA-AVR range.

name: Ult_Osc_AD_X_Momentum_Swing
description: A momentum strategy for VN30F1M using Ultimate Oscillator strength combined with ADX trend regime filtering. It avoids volume division by relying on pre-calculated indicators and vectorized price action exits.

name: Variance_Expansion_Trend_Follower
description: Enters trend-following positions when short-term EMA crosses above long-term EMA (golden cross) and price is above fast EMA, but only if rolling price variance is above its own moving average, indicating expanding volatility that favors trend continuation. Exits on opposite cross or when variance contracts below a threshold. This avoids choppy sideways markets and captures strong trending moves.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (EMA_fast < EMA_slow) | (VAR_short < VAR_MA * 0.8). Exit Short: (EMA_fast > EMA_slow) | (VAR_short < VAR_MA * 0.8).

name: Variance_Squeeze_ADX_Breakout
description: Identifies volatility contraction periods (variance squeeze) as a precursor to directional breakouts. Enters long when price breaks above Donchian channel high, variance is compressed relative to its recent minimum, and ADX confirms trend strength (> threshold). Enters short on similar breakdown. Exits using ATR trailing stop to capture sustained moves while protecting against reversals.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: close < (trailing_high - 2.0 * ATR). Exit Short: close > (trailing_low + 2.0 * ATR).

name: VN30_TRIMA_Bb_Width_Trend
description: Trend following strategy using TRIMA for trend direction and Bollinger Band Width (Volatility) as a filter. Avoids division by zero issues found in raw volume volatility calculations.

name: VN30_TRIMA_ROC_ADX_Trend_Follow
description: Trend following strategy using TRIMA for direction, ROC for momentum confirmation and ADX to filter low volatility regimes. Exits on price deviation beyond trend line relative to normalized ATR.

name: VN30_Zscore_Cmf_Adx_MeanReversion
description: Mean Reversion strategy using Rolling Z-Score for overextension detection, confirmed by CMF volume flow and filtered by ADX to ensure range-bound market conditions.

name: Volatility_Asymmetric_Donchian_Breakout
description: A balanced 10-minute intraday strategy engineered to capitalize on structural price expansions in the VN30F1M index while avoiding fakeouts within sideways regimes. The strategy defines its core execution zones using dynamic channel breakouts. To neutralize the systemic risk of zero-volume periods or thin bars, entries are strictly conditioned on an absolute volatility threshold determined by a short-term Standard Deviation relative to its medium-term baseline. Fully vectorized, loop-free exits are processed at the close of the candlestick using an adaptive midprice tracking band.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < Midprice_Exit - 0.25 * ATR). Exit Short: (close > Midprice_Exit + 0.25 * ATR).

name: Volatility_BB_Engulf_Pullback
description: A volatility-based breakout strategy using Bollinger Bands and ATR to filter trades, triggered by an Engulfing pattern. Exits on mean reversion into the middle band.

name: Volatility_Squeeze_Kama_Trend
description: A high-quality swing intraday strategy designed for the 15-minute timeframe. It utilizes a Bollinger Bands and Keltner Channel squeeze comparison to identify structural consolidation regimes and prevent whipsaws. Once the squeeze releases (volatility expansion), the Kaufman Adaptive Moving Average (KAMA) defines the structural trend direction to establish positions. Clean vector-based exits are triggered when the price crosses the standard trailing Parabolic SAR, optimizing profit capture over broader intraday moves.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < SAR). Exit Short: (close > SAR).

name: Volume_Kama_Stochf_Strategy
description: A trend-following strategy using volatility-adaptive KAMA for direction, StochF for momentum confirmation within the trend, and CMF to ensure volume support. Exits when price breaks below/above trend line adjusted by ATR.

name: VWAP_ZScore_MeanReversion
description: Mean-reversion strategy using rolling VWAP as adaptive mean. Enters long when price is significantly below VWAP (negative z-score) and ADX confirms a ranging market (low trend strength). Enters short when price is significantly above VWAP. Exits when price reverts to within a tighter z-score band around VWAP.

name: WilliamsR_NATR_Midprice_Breakout
description: Breakout strategy using Midprice-based volatility channel with Williams %R oversold/overbought confirmation and NATR volatility filter. Entries on channel breakout with oscillator extreme, exits when price reverts to midprice.

formula.entry_long: close > upper_band AND willr < -80 AND natr > min_natr
formula.entry_short: close < lower_band AND willr > -20 AND natr > min_natr
formula.exit_logic: Exit long when close < midprice. Exit short when close > midprice.

name: Willr_Natr_Ema_Volatility_Trail
description: Captures momentum breakouts when price is oversold relative to EMA but volatility expands, exiting on volatility contraction.

name: WMA_ATR_Angle_Breakout
description: 15-minute breakout strategy using Weighted Moving Average (WMA) of typical price as adaptive center, ATR-based volatility channel, and linear regression angle of volume-weighted price as confirmation filter to avoid false breakouts during low momentum.

formula.exit_logic: For long positions: exit when close < WMA_tp - trail_mult * ATR; For short positions: exit when close > WMA_tp + trail_mult * ATR

name: Wma_Roc_Cmf_Flow_Momentum
description: A momentum strategy using WMA for trend direction and CMF for volume flow confirmation, avoiding ADX/EMA/KAMA families found in accepted strategies. Exits on SMA(20) break to ensure distinct exit logic.

name: ZScore_ADX_MeanReversion
description: Mean reversion strategy using rolling z-score of price and ADX filter to identify oversold/overbought conditions in ranging markets. Enters long when price is significantly below its mean (z-score < -threshold) and market is ranging (ADX < threshold). Exits when price reverts to mean (z-score > 0) or a trend emerges (ADX rises above exit threshold). Short entries on overbought conditions.

name: Zscore_Cmf_MeanReversion_15m
description: Strategy that buys when price is significantly below the rolling mean (oversold) confirmed by positive cumulative flow, and sells on overbought conditions. Uses Z-Score for distance from mean to avoid fixed band noise.

name: Zscore_LinearReg_Trend_Follow
description: Trend following strategy using Linear Regression as dynamic support/resistance and Rolling Z-Score for momentum confirmation. Avoids noise by filtering entries when price deviates significantly from mean.

name: ZScore_Tema_Natr_Breakout
description: A trend-following strategy using TEMA for direction, Rolling Z-Score to confirm price deviation strength relative to mean (momentum), and NATR to filter volatility expansion. Exits on reversal or significant volatility contraction.

name: [10m] BBand_RSI_MeanReversal
description: Captures mean-reverting moves on VN30 10m by trading when price touches Bollinger Bands extremes combined with RSI confirmation. Avoids noise in ranging markets.

name: [10m] Channel_Break_Ema_Follow
description: Breakout strategy using Bollinger Band upper/lower levels with EMA trend confirmation and ATR volatility filter to avoid choppy trades in ranging markets.

name: [10m] Cmf_Roc_Vol_Momentum_Follow
description: A momentum strategy using Cumulative Flow Volume (CMF) and Rate of Change (ROC). It enters when volume flow is positive while price momentum remains above a threshold, exiting on reversal or loss of momentum. Designed to avoid division-by-zero errors by relying on library functions.

name: [10m] Ema_Macd_Trend_Follow
description: Trend following strategy using EMA for direction and MACD cross for entry confirmation. Avoids ADX/Slope filters to reduce multicollinearity with accepted strategies.

name: [10m] EMA_RSI_ATR_Revert
description: Captures mean reversion opportunities when price deviates below the moving average in low volatility regimes, confirmed by RSI oversold conditions. Exits on ATR contraction and price return to EMA.

name: [10m] Engulf_Pattern_Cmf_Adx_Vol_Follow
description: A pattern-driven strategy that uses engulfing candle patterns combined with Cumulative Money Flow (CMF) to confirm institutional volume participation. It filters out noise during low-volume periods and avoids range traps by requiring positive/negative CMF flow alongside the price action signal.

name: [10m] KAMA_CMF_Vol_Flow_Trend
description: Trend-following strategy using Kama as the dynamic trend baseline and CMF to confirm volume flow direction, filtering out low-volume choppy periods.

name: [10m] LinearReg_Slope_BB_Breakout
description: Uses Linear Regression Slope for trend direction and Bollinger Bands as dynamic channel boundaries. Entry on breakout with slope confirmation, exit when price reverts to regression line or crosses back inside the band.

name: [10m] LinearReg_Slope_CCI_Momentum_Continuation
description: Uses linear regression slope for trend direction and CCI momentum filter to confirm entries, with volatility-based exit logic.

name: [10m] LinearReg_Slope_Cmf_Vol_Trail
description: A trend-following strategy that uses the slope of a linear regression to identify direction, confirmed by Cumulative Flow (CMF) volume support. It avoids ADX/MACD/RSI heavy combos found in other strategies.

indicators.name: CMF_Flow
indicators.definition: self.feat.cmf(high, low, close, open_price, volume, timeperiod=50)

name: [10m] LinearReg_Slope_Roc_Ema_Trend_Follow
description: Identifies trend direction using linear regression slope and confirms momentum with rate of change. Exits when price closes below the EMA to avoid trailing stop loss issues.

name: [10m] LinearReg_Slope_Stochrsi_ATR_Continuation
description: A trend continuation strategy using linear regression slope for direction, StochRSI for momentum pullback confirmation (buy dip in uptrend), and ATR for volatility filter. Avoids volume division issues common on VN30F1M.

name: [10m] Natr_Ema_Cross_Vol_Follow
description: Volatility-filtered trend strategy using EMA direction and NATR expansion to confirm momentum. Exits on price reversal or volatility contraction.

name: [10m] RSIMACD_Price_Div_Reversal
description: Captures momentum divergence between Price Trend (EMA) and Oscillators (RSI/MACD). Enters Long when price is in an uptrend but RSI indicates oversold conditions, suggesting a potential reversal or continuation of trend strength despite low momentum.

name: [10m] Session_LinearReg_Stochrsi_Trend_Follow
description: Intraday trend-following strategy using Linear Regression Slope for direction and Stochastic RSI for pullback confirmation. Designed to avoid the 'Willr/NATR' combination used in previous accepted strategies by utilizing a momentum oscillator (StochRSI) instead.

name: [10m] Stochrsi_Cmf_Divergence_Breakout
description: Captures momentum divergence between price and oscillator (StochRSI) confirmed by volume flow (CMF), filtered by volatility expansion to avoid choppy markets.

name: [10m] Stoch_Cmf_Ema_Momentum
description: Captures price acceleration when volume flow (CMF) aligns with fast stochastic momentum, filtered by trend direction via EMA. Exits on volatility contraction or trend reversal.

indicators.name: Stochf_Fast
indicators.definition: self.feat.stochf(open_price, high, low, close, timeperiod=5, fast_period=3)

name: [10m] T3_NATR_Trend_Follow
description: Trend following strategy using Triple Exponential (T3) for trend direction and NATR to filter volatility noise. Entry on price crossing above T3 when volatility is active, exit on reversal.

name: [15m] ADX_Slope_Acceleration_Trend_Follow
description: A trend-following strategy for VN30F1M that filters trades based on market regime (ADX) and momentum acceleration (Linear Regression Slope). It avoids mean-reversion logic to combat noise, focusing purely on high-quality directional moves. Entry requires positive slope confirmation alongside ADX strength, avoiding low volatility chop.

name: [15m] Bollinger_Ad_X_Volatility_Breakout
description: A volatility-filtered breakout strategy using Bollinger Bands for dynamic support/resistance and ADX to confirm trend strength, avoiding choppy sideways markets.

name: [15m] Donchian_Channel_ADX_Trend_Follow
description: Trend following strategy using a rolling price channel (Donchian style) combined with ADX regime filtering. Avoids volume division issues by relying on High/Low ranges and trend strength.

name: [15m] EMA_ATR_Channel_Breakout
description: Trend-following strategy using a dynamic channel defined by EMA +/- ATR volatility expansion. Entry on breakout above upper band with momentum confirmation, exit when price reverts below lower band or trend fails.

name: [15m] EMA_Atr_Piercing_Trend
description: Trend following strategy using EMA for direction, ATR for volatility filtering, and Piercing Pattern as confirmation. Avoids Slope/CMF heavy combos to reduce multicollinearity.

name: [15m] Harami_Cross_LrSlope_ATR_Follow
description: Uses harami_cross_pattern to confirm trend continuation within a positive linearreg_slope direction, filtered by volatility (natr) for noise reduction. Exit logic uses ATR-based reversal instead of hard price levels.

name: [15m] LinRegSlope_Cmf_Stochrsi_Trend
description: Trend following strategy using Linear Regression Slope for direction, CMF for volume flow confirmation, and Stochastic RSI to filter momentum pullbacks. Exits on trend reversal or overbought conditions.

name: [15m] LR_Slope_MACDCross
description: Uses Linear Regression Slope for trend direction and MACD Histogram crossing for momentum confirmation. Exits on Momentum Reversal (MACD Cross) to differentiate from Price/Regression breakouts.

name: [15m] Macd_Cmf_Natr_Trend
description: Uses MACD histogram direction for momentum confirmation, CMF flow accumulation to validate trend strength, and ATR volatility filter to avoid choppy low-volume noise.

name: [15m] RegFlow_AdX_Follow
description: Trend following strategy using Linear Regression Price as dynamic support, CMF for flow confirmation, and ADX to filter choppy regimes. Avoids simple EMA/MACD crossovers by focusing on price position relative to regression line.

name: [15m] RSI_ADX_Mean_Reversion_Swing
description: Mean reversion strategy entering on oversold conditions (RSI < 30) during low volatility regimes (ADX < threshold), exiting when momentum reverses to neutral.

name: [15m] RSI_EMA_Adx_Momentum
description: Trend-following strategy using EMA direction, ADX regime filter, and RSI momentum confirmation. Avoids the 'Slope' family which is heavily used in accepted strategies.

name: [15m] Session_VWAP_Flow_Breakout
description: Breaks out from the session's volume-weighted average price (VWAP) when institutional flow aligns. Uses Rolling VWAP as a dynamic pivot and CMF for direction confirmation, avoiding standard EMA/ADX dominance.

name: [15m] Stochrsi_LrSlope_Follow
description: A trend-following strategy using Linear Regression Slope for direction and Stochastic RSI for momentum confirmation. It avoids ADX/CMF reliance found in previous strategies by focusing on price vs regression line dynamics.

name: [15m] T3_Cmf_Atr_Trend
description: Trend following strategy using Triple Exponential Moving Average (T3) for trend direction, CMF to confirm volume flow support, and ATR-based trailing stop logic. Avoids common EMA/LinearReg Slope combinations.

name: [15m] TRIMA_Rsi_Volatility_Swing
description: A trend-following strategy using TRIMA for direction, RSI for momentum filter to avoid choppy entries in ranging markets. Exit logic uses volatility-based conditions (ATR) rather than hard price stops.

name: [15m] Ultos_Ema_Cmf_Trend_Follow
description: Trend following strategy using Ultra Oscillator (Ultos) for momentum confirmation, EMA for trend direction, and CMF as volume filter. Exits based on Bollinger Bands volatility to comply with 'No Virtual SL' rules.

name: [15m] Vol_NATR_Adx_Ema_Trend
description: Trend-following strategy that enters on price direction aligned with volatility expansion (NATR slope) and ADX regime confirmation. Exits when trend reverses or volatility contracts.

name: [15m] Vwma_LinReg_Slope_Momentum
