description: Trend following strategy using Rolling VWAP as the dynamic mean and Linear Regression Slope for momentum direction. Filters out choppy markets by requiring positive/negative slope alignment with price position relative to volume-weighted average.

name: [30m] ChanBreak_Slope_Bb_Trail
description: Channel breakout strategy using dynamic price bands and linear regression slope confirmation, avoiding volume-based indicators to prevent division-by-zero errors on zero-volume bars.

name: [30m] CMF_LinearReg_Slope_ADX
description: Combines Volume Flow and Price Acceleration with ADX Regime Filter to capture trend momentum in trending regimes only. Uses Linear Regression Slope for acceleration confirmation instead of simple price direction.

name: [30m] Kama_Trend_Cmf_Adx_Follow
description: Trend following strategy using KAMA for adaptive trend direction, ADX as regime filter to avoid choppy markets, and CMF volume confirmation. Exits on price crossing back below/above the Kama line.

name: [30m] MACD_Cmf_Volatility_Signal
description: Momentum strategy using MACD histogram for direction and CMF volume confirmation, filtered by NATR volatility expansion to avoid choppy regimes.

name: [30m] Pattern_BB_ADX_Follow
description: Uses Bullish Engulfing pattern combined with Bollinger Band breakout and ADX regime filter to capture trend momentum while avoiding choppy sideways markets.

name: [30m] Roc_Ema_At_Trend_Follow
description: Trend Following strategy using Rate of Change (ROC) for momentum trigger, EMA(20) for trend direction, and ATR to filter low volatility chop. Entry requires price above EMA with positive ROC acceleration. Exit triggers on close below a volatility-adjusted threshold.

name: [30m] RollingVWAP_Ema_NATR_Trend
description: Trend following strategy using Price deviation from Rolling VWAP as the primary baseline, confirmed by EMA slope direction and NATR volatility expansion filter to capture trend continuations while avoiding chop.

name: [30m] Stochf_Ema_Pullback_Trend
description: Captures pullbacks in the main trend using EMA direction filtered by Oversold/Overbought Stochastic. Avoids Slope and ADX saturation.

name: [30m] Stochf_Slope_Divergence_Trail
description: Captures trend continuation pullbacks by aligning Price Slope direction with Oscillator Momentum crossing, avoiding ADX/ROC combinations used in other strategies.

name: [30m] StochRSI_BB_MeanReversion
description: Mean reversion strategy using Stochastic RSI and Bollinger Bands to identify price extremes. Enters on touch of lower/upper band with oscillator confirmation, exits when price crosses back towards the middle or signal reverses.

name: [30m] Volatility_Sma_Cmf_Trail
description: A volatility-based trend-following strategy using SMA for direction, CMF for volume flow confirmation, and NATR expansion filter. Avoids ADX filters to reduce signal lag while managing chop.

name: [60m] BB_Width_NATR_ADX_Regime
description: Strategy detects volatility regime change using Bollinger Band width expansion combined with NATR and ADX trend strength. Avoids hard stop losses by exiting when price closes back inside the channel or volatility contracts.

name: [60m] Cmf_Ema_BbWidth_TrendCross
description: A volume-weighted trend-following strategy using EMA for direction, CMF for flow confirmation, and Bollinger Band Width to filter low-volatility chop. Exits occur on price reversal or signal cross.

name: [60m] CMF_Macd_SmaExit
description: A momentum strategy using Cumulative Volume Flow (CMF) to confirm MACD trend direction, exiting on price reversal relative to a moving average.

name: [60m] Divergence_StochRs_Roc_Adr
description: Detects mean-reversion bounces using StochRSI oversold/overbought conditions combined with ROC momentum confirmation, avoiding trend-following logic to prevent overlap with accepted strategies.

name: [60m] EMA_Natr_Stochrsi_MeanRevert
description: Captures pullbacks to EMA when momentum reverses (StochRSI), filtered by volatility contraction via NATR. Exits on mean re-cross or volatility expansion.

name: [60m] EMA_Trend_Piercing_Cross
description: Uses EMA trend direction and Piercing pattern confirmation for entry, exits on price reversal relative to EMA.

name: [60m] LinearRegSlope_RSI_Momentum_Cross
description: A momentum strategy that uses the slope of a linear regression (20-period) to identify trend strength and RSI cross signals for entry/exit. It avoids ADX, MACD, EMA combinations found in accepted strategies.

name: [60m] LinearReg_Slope_Stochf_Trend
description: Trend Following strategy using Linear Regression Slope for direction and Stochastic Fast for momentum confirmation, filtered by ATR volatility.

name: [60m] Linreg_Adx_Trend_Follow
description: Trend following strategy using Linear Regression Price position and ADX regime filter. Enters when price is above the trend line with strong volatility, exits on reversal or ATR expansion.

formula.exit_long: (close < linreg_price) | (atr(high, low, close, timeperiod=14) > self.feat.atr(high, low, close, timeperiod=3).mean())

name: [60m] Linreg_Natr_Roc_Volatility_Confirmation
description: Strategy uses Linear Regression Slope to identify trend direction, filtered by ATR volatility expansion and ROC momentum confirmation. Entry occurs when price breaks above the regression line with positive slope and acceleration. Exit relies on mean reversion or momentum reversal.

name: [60m] Midpoint_CMFCross_ATR_Trail
description: Uses the intrabar midpoint (High+Low)/2 as a dynamic channel center, combined with CMF volume flow and ATR volatility filtering to identify mean-reversion bounces or trend continuations within price range.

name: [60m] TRIMA_RollingMax_Breakout
description: Trend-following breakout strategy using TRIMA for trend direction and Rolling Max of Highs to define resistance levels. ATR filter ensures volatility expansion before entry.

name: [60m] TRIX_Mom_Sma_Vol_Follow
description: Uses TRIX for momentum confirmation aligned with SMA trend direction, filtered by ATR volatility to avoid choppy markets.
